page_metadata.biotools__summary: FoldMiner aligns a user-supplied or identified query structure to a database of single domain targets to discover structural neighbours and characteristic motifs.  Query structures can also be aligned to one or more user-specified structures using the LOCK 2 algorithm.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FoldMiner aligns a user-supplied or identified query structure to a database of single domain targets to discover structural neighbours and characteristic motifs.  Query structures can also be aligned to one or more user-specified structures using the LOCK 2 algorithm.
